text:
Healthy living is about more than just eating vegetables. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, whole grains, and lean proteins, gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, such as walking, cycling, or swimming, strengthens your heart and muscles while reducing stress.

Equally important is getting enough sleep. Aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover and your mind stay sharp. Mental health also matters—take time to relax, connect with friends, or practice mindfulness. Finally, strive for a healthy work-life balance. Set boundaries between work and personal time to avoid burnout. By combining these habits, you can feel stronger, happier, and more energized every day.
